info.title: bitbucketsarifreport
info.description: Reads a Sarif formatted JSON file and reports results to Bitbucket's reports API. Intended to be used as part of a Bitbucket Pipeline.

options.name: --file
options.description: The SARIF file to read and report to Bitbucket.

options.name: --proxy
options.description: The address for the proxy server that authenticates requests. The default address is for direct usage in a Bitbucket Pipeline. Use 'http://host.docker.internal:29418' if this is running inside a custom pipe. [default: http://localhost:29418/]
